task: Extend agent-build-setup.ts to enforce CLAUDE_SUPPORTED_VERSION and create claude.plugin.version-support.test.ts following the Codex analog pattern.

key_reasoning.reason: Two distinct test components across different areas: agent-build-setup.ts (globalSetup modification) and claude.plugin.version-support.test.ts (new unit test); pattern is clear from the Codex analog but requires coordination between the integration setup layer and the plugin unit test layer.

The Codex version-support test is an established template, but the Claude adaptation has four documented deviations: mock target must be native-installer.js not processes.js, version string from claude --version output requires prefix stripping before comparison, execSync synchronous constraint in globalSetup must be respected, and the TypeScript import path from agent-build-setup.ts must align with the existing Node.js context precedent.
